strengths: Completed the task in 35 seconds with no penalties
Maintained steady cutting motion throughout the circle
Successfully cut all required green rope segments
weaknesses: Task appears to be performed in VR simulation rather than standard FLS setup
Unable to assess proper gauze traction and scissor technique due to simulation format
Missing traditional precision cutting elements like marked circle on gauze

drills.name: Standard FLS Setup Practice

drills.targets_weakness: VR simulation format limiting skill assessment

drills.name: Traction-angle practice

progression_note: While completion time is good, transition to standard FLS equipment is essential for proper skill development. Focus on replicating this speed with actual gauze cutting.
